/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--enable-auto-import CMakeFiles/JogoDosSemaforos.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/JogoDosSemaforos.dir/menus.c.o CMakeFiles/JogoDosSemaforos.dir/jogo.c.o CMakeFiles/JogoDosSemaforos.dir/bot.c.o CMakeFiles/JogoDosSemaforos.dir/utils.c.o -o JogoDosSemaforos.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libJogoDosSemaforos.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0
